gift_note: Good gift for a nearly-three moving off peg boards ,  check cupboard for duplicate Orchard 12-piece sets first.
ownership_note: Orchard farm/jungle 12-piece sets duplicate across UK nurseries. Borrow or theme-swap before buying a second identical format.
educational_objective: Puzzles about strategy ,  turn piece, compare, try again. Low-frustration; child sees picture first.
age_stage_nuance: Versus 28, 30m shape sorters and peg puzzles: reject baby peg puzzles mastered months ago; need 3, 12 piece jigsaws with real interlocking pieces and a visible picture to work from.
what_to_look_for: 3, 12 pieces; chunky; clear image; progressive sets; UK mainstream (Galt, Orchard Toys, Ravensburger junior, Bigjigs).
what_to_avoid: Peg puzzles as Top Picks; 50+ pieces; flimsy cardboard; age-18m marketed as a fresh 34, 36m buy; honest 3+ only marks for the youngest months in band.
methodology: Benchmarked UK toddler jigsaw lines (Orchard First Friends, Ravensburger My First, Bigjigs 6-piece wood, Galt 4-in-a-box) against the brief: peg puzzles out, 2, 12 real interlocking pieces with picture-first completion. Captured structured age_signals from live brand/Amazon pages (2+, 18m+, manufacturer 24m). Ranked with buying_factor_memo for strategy fit, age honesty, evidence, and gift variety. Every Top 5 primary was smoke-checked with stage3-url-preflight.mjs and stage3-availability-check.mjs (all buyable HTTP 200) on 2026-07-22 before locking order.
buying_factor_memo: Five factors set order for nearly-three first jigsaws. First, real interlocking strategy: 6, 12 piece scenes with a visible picture beat peg boards and 2-piece warm-ups already mastered. Second, age overlap with 34, 36m: Orchard/Ravensburger/Bigjigs lines marked 2+ or 18m+ pass FF age gates; honest 3+ only marks (Big Wheels, Galt 4-in-a-box) stay on the longlist. Third, progressive value: a box that steps 4→12 or mixes 2/3-piece bridges before 12-piece wins shelf space. Fourth, review depth on working UK primaries ,  Amazon and Orchard on-site where scrapeable. Fifth, distinct parent jobs: farm 12-piece plan, jungle theme swap, thick-card warm-up, wooden durability, and emergency-vehicle quick wins without five near-duplicate farm sets.

editorial_sources_checked: In The Playroom Ravensburger My First review
safety_sources_checked: Manufacturer age marks on product pages

age_signals.raw_text: Manufacturer minimum age 24 months (Amazon); Ages 2+ on Orchard

key_specs.included_items: Two farm-animal jigsaws; talk guide on box
key_specs.other: Strong colour/background clues on each piece

top_picks.product_description_under_30_words: Two farm-animal jigsaws with chunky interlocking cardboard pieces and clear finished pictures, a step up from peg puzzles when your child is ready for a proper tray.
top_picks.ember_verdict: Nearly-three puzzle play is about turning, comparing and holding a small plan until the picture appears. Two readable twelve-piece farm scenes give that step up from peg puzzles without jumping to grown-up trays. Clear animals and backgrounds keep the plan visible for a first proper twelve-piece job.
top_picks.rank_rationale: #1 over #2: Farm Friends is the clearest 12-piece strategy step-up with the deepest Amazon proof; jungle theme at #2 is the same spec so farm wins as the default first buy.
top_picks.why_it_fits: 12 pieces hits the strategy brief without jumping to 20+; UK-made Orchard quality; clear picture-first design; strong Amazon and brand-site proof.
top_picks.gift_note: Reliable small-box gift under £10; wrap-friendly and familiar on UK nursery shelves.
top_picks.ownership_note: Skip if you already own Orchard 12-piece farm or jungle sets from a younger sibling - borrow a different theme first.
top_picks.safety_notes: Small parts - supervise if mouthing is still common at the younger end of nearly three.
top_picks.review_quality_note: Parents praise chunky pieces and wipe-clean board; 12 pieces ambitious before 30m , right band for 34, 36m.
top_picks.preloved_signal_note: Common on Vinted; check all 24 pieces present — Orchard sells replacement pieces.
top_picks.substitute_if_unavailable: First Jungle Friends Jigsaw Puzzles (longlist rank 2)
top_picks.evidence_notes: Mumsnet names Orchard progressive jigsaws among trusted toddler puzzle brands.

key_specs.included_items: Two jungle-animal jigsaws; talk guide on box
key_specs.other: Same First Friends format as Farm — theme swap only

top_picks.product_description_under_30_words: Four farm mini-jigsaws in one Galt box that rise from two to five pieces, with thick cardboard pieces sized for little hands still building confidence.
top_picks.ember_verdict: When a full twelve-piece tray still looks like a stretch, rising piece counts give gentler starts in one box. Thick Galt pieces survive lots of turning while they learn to finish a picture. Rising piece counts before bigger interlocking sets, without asking for adult patience on day one.
top_picks.rank_rationale: #2 over #3: Jungle Friends matches the core 12-piece strategy job; it edges Ravensburger My First because the box mark is honestly 2+ rather than an 18m warm-up line.
top_picks.why_it_fits: Identical Orchard First Friends quality with a distinct theme for children bored of farm sets.
top_picks.gift_note: Strong unisex gift when you know they do not already have Farm Friends.
top_picks.ownership_note: Borrow or buy jungle only if farm 12-piece sets are already in the cupboard.
top_picks.safety_notes: Small parts possible - standard toddler puzzle supervision.
top_picks.review_quality_note: On-site Orchard reviews 5.0/52; Amazon ASIN not reliably scrapeable for this SKU.
top_picks.preloved_signal_note: Check both puzzles complete; cardboard wears well.
top_picks.substitute_if_unavailable: First Farm Friends Jigsaw Puzzles (longlist rank 1)
top_picks.evidence_notes: Specialist exemption: working Orchard primary; on-site 52 reviews at 5.0 meets bar but is not Amazon-scraped.

top_picks.product_name: On The Farm — My First Jigsaw Puzzles

age_signals.raw_text: From 18 months (box); use 4–5 piece puzzles at 34–36m

key_specs.other: Progressive piece count in one box

top_picks.product_description_under_30_words: A Ravensburger box of four thick farm mini-jigsaws that rise from two to five pieces, so you can start small and move up as confidence grows.
top_picks.ember_verdict: A full twelve-piece tray can look like a lot when interlocking is still new. Ravensburger My First farm scenes keep the picture clear while pieces stay thick enough for lots of turning. A gentler start for families easing into interlocking puzzles before the bigger farm and jungle trays.
top_picks.rank_rationale: #3 over #4: Ravensburger thick-card warm-ups build turn-compare-try with massive review proof before the wooden 6-piece trays; wood wins durability but fewer aggregated UK reviews.
top_picks.why_it_fits: Excellent cardboard quality; huge Amazon review base; teaches strategy on 4 - 5 pieces before scaling up.
top_picks.gift_note: Cheap, recognisable brand - fine as a stocking filler if they have no jigsaws yet.
top_picks.ownership_note: If peg puzzles and 2-piece sets are mastered, start on the 4 - 5 piece puzzles or skip to rank 1.
top_picks.safety_notes: Standard small-parts guidance for youngest marked age.
top_picks.review_quality_note: Long-running UK favourite; multiple parent blogs corroborate thick-piece quality.
evidence_sources: Mum of a Premature Baby review
top_picks.preloved_signal_note: Ubiquitous on resale — pieces hold up well.
top_picks.evidence_notes: Strong consensus across Amazon + UK parent blogs for My First line.

key_specs.other: Real interlocking wooden pieces — not peg lift-out

top_picks.product_description_under_30_words: Three wooden safari jigsaws in trays, six interlocking pieces each, sturdy enough for everyday floor play when you want wood rather than cardboard.
top_picks.ember_verdict: When cardboard is already chewed or stepped on in daily play, wood holds up better on the floor. Six-piece safari trays still need a small plan, but the material survives everyday life. Wooden durability in the mix, not another soft cardboard set for the same job.
top_picks.rank_rationale: #4 over #5: Wooden 6-piece interlock is a distinct material/format with honest 2+ mark; Rescue Squad is brilliant for short finishes but only 2, 3 pieces , less strategy for confident nearly-threes.
top_picks.why_it_fits: Real interlocking wood at 6 pieces; UK heritage brand; budget price; distinct from cardboard picks.
top_picks.gift_note: Compact wooden set - nice for families avoiding plastic; under £6.
top_picks.ownership_note: Also available as Big Movers (vehicles) if safari animals are duplicated at home.
top_picks.safety_notes: Conforms to current European safety standards per manufacturer.
top_picks.review_quality_note: Specialist wooden-toy retailers stock widely; Lipscore on Bigjigs site not scraped honestly.
top_picks.evidence_notes: Specialist exemption: reputable UK wooden brand with clear 6-piece interlock spec; review widget not agent-scrapeable on primary.

age_signals.raw_text: Perfect for Ages 2+; manufacturer minimum age 24 months (Amazon)

key_specs.piece_count: 6 puzzles: mix of 2-piece and 3-piece; 6 play pieces
key_specs.included_items: Ambulance, fire engine, helicopter and more plus character play pieces
key_specs.other: Match driver to vehicle after building

top_picks.product_description_under_30_words: Six small emergency vehicle jigsaws in one Orchard Toys box, mostly two and three pieces, plus character pieces for matching drivers to ambulance, fire engine and more.
top_picks.ember_verdict: Vehicle fans need a confidence building set before a fuller twelve-piece tray. Short rescue scenes keep turn, compare and try again going without a table full of bits, and the characters invite a little matching story after the picture is done. Rescue vehicle play with a short finish they can own.
top_picks.rank_rationale: #5 completes the set: Rescue Squad covers cautious starters and vehicle fans when a twelve-piece tray still looks like a stretch; it trails wood and Ravensburger warm-ups on strategy depth but wins on theme and Amazon proof.
top_picks.why_it_fits: Real interlocking pieces at 2 - 3 count; huge Amazon review base; distinct emergency-vehicle hook.
top_picks.gift_note: Compact box under £7; strong for children who love sirens and rescue vehicles.
top_picks.ownership_note: Different enough from farm/jungle 12-piece sets to own alongside - unless you already have Orchard transport first-puzzles.
top_picks.safety_notes: Small play pieces - bag for younger nearly-threes still mouthing.
top_picks.review_quality_note: Consistent praise for first jigsaw and vehicle matching play.
top_picks.preloved_signal_note: Check all six puzzles and play pieces — cardboard wears well.
top_picks.substitute_if_unavailable: Big Wheels Jigsaw Puzzle (longlist rank 7) — only if child is solidly 36m+
top_picks.evidence_notes: Amazon Choice signal; Orchard on-site 5.0/52 corroborates.

Floor road builder — different play pattern (layout not single-picture strategy). Mumsnet loves it but wrong card.

guidance_notes.text: Jigsaw sets are ideal borrow-from-a-friend or pre-loved buys — check all pieces and corner wear. Orchard and Ravensburger sell replacement pieces if one is missing.
Before buying, dig out peg puzzles and 2-piece sets from the toy box. If they are still challenging, start with Rescue Squad or Ravensburger 4–5 piece puzzles before 12-piece sets.
Hold off on 20+ piece floor puzzles and 50-piece character sets until 12-piece jigsaws feel easy — usually a few months after this band for most children.

qa_summary.notes: Top 5 primaries preflight + availability buyable 2026-07-22. Big Wheels/Galt 3+ moved to longlist. Specialist exemption on Jungle Friends (Orchard reviews) and Bigjigs Safari.

ingestion_ready.founder_review_notes: Fresh Mode A v3 run. No peg puzzles in Top 5. Distinct best-for tags. Ravensburger pick 3 needs UI copy that uses 4–5 piece puzzles, not 18m headline.
